review_title: Rossum: Data Extraction with Artificial intelligence
description: Great solution to tackle costly processing of incoming invoices.
author: Michal K.
pros: Rossum is very progressive and people there are very opened to new ideas and suggestions for improvements of their solution - representative. Representative is made so intuitive that any user learns easily how to use it really quickly.
cons: A few nice-to-haves came to our minds when using representative but these will be implemented in the future.

review_title: Better, Cheaper, More Ethical Partners Exist
description: While Rossum was an affordable, decent solution, better more cost appropriate solutions now exist on the market. Working with Rossum and their unethical behavior (if not illegal) results in a vehement recommendation that no one work with this company.
author: Robert M.
pros: The product does return some quality information on invoices.
cons: The Rossum pricing increased exorbitantly and the team acted in unethical and potentially illegal ways.

review_title: Unlocking the Potential of Rossum: A Comprehensive Review of its Pros and Cons
description: As a user of Rossum, I have both positive and negative experiences to share. On the positive side, the software is user-friendly, offers automation features that save time and effort on data entry, is able to extract data accurately, flexible and can be integrated with other systems. It also has helpful customer support. However, it can be complex to set up, struggles with extracting data accurately from certain types of documents, and does not handle different languages well. Additionally, it is quite costly, especially for small businesses. It's important to evaluate if it fits the specific needs of your business and weigh the pros and cons before making any decisions.
author: Emil L.
pros: I'm very impressed with its capabilities. I found it very simple to get started using the software right away because it is so incredibly user-friendly and simple to navigate. The Rossum automation feature has been one of the biggest advantages for me. It has significantly improved my efficiency and allowed me to save a lot of time and effort on data entry. The software's ability to quickly and accurately extract data has been of great assistance to my business. Rossum's adaptability is yet another major plus. It can be integrated with many different programs and platforms, which enables me to further automate and streamline my processes. The software is versatile and usable in a variety of situations because it can handle various document types. I also value Rossum's customer service. I've needed help with a few questions and problems, and the support staff has always been very accommodating and quick to respond. In conclusion, I wholeheartedly endorse Rossum for any company looking to automate their data entry process and boost productivity. I am overjoyed with the outcomes because it has completely changed the game for my company.
cons: As a user of Rossum, I've discovered that while it has some great features for automating data entry and boosting productivity, it also has some drawbacks. The software can be challenging to set up, especially for those without a background in technology, which has been one of my main complaints. The initial setup procedure can be tedious and frustrating. The software occasionally fails to accurately extract data from specific kinds of documents, which is another drawback. Getting the software to recognize and extract data from documents with intricate formatting or unusual layouts has proven to be difficult for me. Rossum also has trouble speaking in various languages. It may be challenging to get the desired results if you're working with documents that are written in a language other than English because the software may have trouble accurately extracting data. Finally, Rossum is an expensive option, especially for small businesses, making it a less attractive choice. Overall, Rossum has some great features that make it simple to automate data entry and increase efficiency, but there are a number of significant drawbacks that can make it difficult to use at times. These include the lengthy setup process, lack of accuracy, language restrictions, and the high price.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Rossum uses AI for data extraction. While not flawless, it delivers acceptable results, particularly when it comes to extracting data from invoices. It may be a convenient solution for large businesses.
cons: Rossum has important drawbacks, starting with its high cost, which can be prohibitive for small and medium businesses. In some cases, hiring a freelancer may be a more cost-effective solution. The setup process can also be lengthy, and there are important limitations in terms of accuracy and language support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quello che ti serve al momento giusto
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Una delle caratteristiche più notevoli di Rossum è la sua interfaccia intuitiva. Anche per chi non è esperto in tecnologia, la piattaforma risulta facile da navigare. La creazione di regole per l'estrazione dei dati è semplice e veloce, consentendo una configurazione personalizzata per soddisfare le esigenze specifiche dell'utente. Una delle principali forze di Rossum è la sua capacità di automatizzare interi processi aziendali. L'automazione della gestione dei documenti riduce il tempo e l'energia necessari per elaborare e archiviare documenti, consentendo alle aziende di concentrarsi su attività più strategiche.
cons: Nessun inconveniente, la piattaforma non mi ha dato nessun problema.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
